news.title: Woman dead, man wounded, suspect in custody after shooting in Cobb County
news.summary: Cobb County police are investigating a deadly shooting that they described as a “domestic violence incident.”

news.title: Orbeez gun shooting: Kennesaw teens arrested after neighborhood attacks
news.summary: Two teens face felony charges following a series of random Orbeez gun shooting incidents targeting children and adults in Kennesaw.

news.title: Two injured, one in custody in domestic shooting in Cobb County
news.summary: Police arrested a man Tuesday night after a domestic dispute escalated into a deadly shooting that left one woman dead and another man hospitalized.

news.title: Woman killed, man injured, suspect arrested after domestic violence shooting at Cobb County home: police
news.summary: Police responded to a home on Laurel Creek Trail near Smyrna around 7:55 p.m. and found a woman dead inside the home and a man shot outside the home.

news.title: Family identifies teen killed after metro Atlanta Fourth of July celebration
news.summary: Jason Fajardo, 17, was one of two people shot shortly after the Gainesville concert.

news.title: Atlanta shooting suspect: Police hunt for gunman who shot 3
news.summary: Atlanta police investigators are asking for the public's help to identify a man who shot three people during a dispute Sunday morning.

news.title: Murder convictions upheld for 2 men in 2022 Gwinnett County carjacking
news.summary: Two gang members convicted in a deadly Peachtree Corners carjacking lost their appeals before the Georgia Supreme Court.

news.title: Man shot, killed as police probe DeKalb County armed robbery
news.summary: A man died Tuesday evening after being shot by DeKalb County police officers responding to an armed robbery.

news.title: Fourth of July family gathering turns into deadly gunfire in Clayton County
news.summary: A Fourth of July family gathering turned tragic when a man was shot and killed on Brenston Boulevard.

news.title: Trooper injured in chain-reaction crash on Georgia 400
news.summary: A Georgia State Patrol trooper and two other drivers were involved in a chain-reaction crash on Georgia 400 near Abernathy Road Tuesday afternoon.

news.title: Motorcyclist dead, another man charged with racing him, going nearly 90 mph during rush hour
news.summary: A man accused of racing on a busy Cobb County road is under arrest after police say the man he was racing died.

news.title: Jonesboro man sentenced to prison in Canton hotel assault
news.summary: A 37-year-old Jonesboro man will serve 10 years in prison after a knife attack on his partner inside a Canton hotel room.

news.title: Peachtree City police crack down on cooking oil theft rings
news.summary: Police in Peachtree City are targeting multi-state theft rings that are siphoning used cooking oil from local restaurants and selling it for record prices.

news.title: Most Wanted suspect caught when police chase ends in fiery crash
news.summary: A murder suspect once considered one of Atlanta’s Most Wanted fugitives is out of the hospital and in jail after a police chase ended in a fiery crash.

news.title: 11 charged in connection with arcade burglaries in metro Atlanta inspired by social media trend
news.summary: The Gwinnett County Police Department said a series of burglaries at Urban Air Adventure locations led to the arrests of 11 people, all under the age of 21.

news.title: Suspect arrested for rape possessed gun linked to Decatur murder, warrants reveal
news.summary: According to warrants, the suspect was arrested for rape, and during a search, officers found a gun on him, which connected him to the murder.

news.title: Arrest made in double shooting that killed man and 13-year-old boy in DeKalb County
news.summary: Authorities said shots were fired at a home on Rockcliff Road on July 2.

news.title: 14 teens, 1 adult arrested linked to Urban Air burglary social media trend in Gwinnett County, police say
news.summary: Police said the trend encourages teens and young adults to enter the business unlawfully after hours to use arcade games, attractions and damage property.

news.title: Police release photos of man wanted for shooting that injured 3 in Atlanta
news.summary: ​The three victims were alert, breathing, and conscious before being transported to Grady Hospital for treatment.

news.title: Man arrested after allegedly shooting up Downtown Athens businesses
news.summary: Police in Athens said Tuesday that a 19-year-old man was arrested after allegedly firing in the area of 246 East Clayton Street.

news.title: Douglasville Police search for suspect accused of indecent exposure along Chapel Hill Road
news.summary: One of the incidents happened on June 13 at a Target on Chapel Hill Road.

news.title: Witnesses said gunfire was 'very common' from house where men were arrested after DeKalb DA's Office employee was hurt by celebratory shots
news.summary: Lakesha Davis, who works in the DeKalb County District Attorney's Office, was critically injured by celebratory gunfire on the Fourth of July.
